Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Melerius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Melerius is Shyrax's magical advisor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Melerius is an Archmage and advisor to Queen Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Melerius is sealed within a ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Melerius can manifest as an elderly, bearded human from Shyrax's ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Melerius's magic allows him to interact with the Aetheric structure of sentient beings, often called the soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Melerius bound a copy of his consciousness to an artifact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — Melerius is a character who recognizes the narrator's mastery of seven magics.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Melerius is a character who seeks lessons from the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Melerius is an ancient Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Melerius is someone whose opinion can be sought regarding an ominous premonition.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Melerius is a ghostly mage and Royal Advisor who can manifest from a magic ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Melerius appears as a translucent, white echo of a human wizard with a long beard and hooded mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Melerius serves the crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Melerius desires more lessons with Captain Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Melerius is a ghost made of grayish conjurations of the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Melerius admires Karoshan society.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Melerius stated that it was not alchemy.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
